title: SkillForge - Coding Bootcamp & Career Path

description: SkillForge - Intensive coding bootcamps and technical training for career switchers. 100% job placement guarantee.
prompt: Build a premium education website inspired by SkillForge - Coding Bootcamp & Career Path. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
SkillForge
Programs Outcomes Curriculum Testimonials
Programs Outcomes Curriculum Testimonials
12-Week Intensive Program

Launch Your Tech Career

Go from zero to hired in 12 weeks. Our job-focused bootcamp has 95% employment rate within 6 months.

95%

Job Placement

$65K+

Avg Salary

500+

Graduates

Bootcamp Programs

Choose your path to employment

Full Stack Web

Master frontend and backend with React, Node.js, and databases. Build 5+ real-world projects.

  • 12 weeks intensive
  • Job guarantee
  • Career coaching

$9,999

Most Popular

Mobile Development

Build iOS and Android apps using React Native and native technologies. 8 portfolio apps.

  • 12 weeks intensive
  • Job guarantee
  • Career coaching

$10,999

Cloud & DevOps

Master AWS, Docker, Kubernetes. Become a cloud infrastructure expert.

  • 12 weeks intensive
  • Job guarantee
  • Career coaching

$10,499

Graduate Outcomes

Job Placement

95%

of graduates employed within 6 months

Average Salary

$65,000+

starting salary in first year

Career Growth

3.5x

average salary growth in 3 years

Top Hiring Companies

Google

Microsoft

Amazon

Apple

Meta

What You'll Learn

Comprehensive curriculum covering industry standards

1 Foundations (Weeks 1-2)

HTML, CSS, JavaScript fundamentals. Git workflows. Development environment setup.

2 Frontend Mastery (Weeks 3-5)

React, state management, responsive design. Build 2 complete single-page applications.

3 Backend Intensive (Weeks 6-8)

Node.js, Express, databases, APIs. Authentication, security best practices.

4 Advanced Topics (Weeks 9-10)

Testing, deployment, CI/CD pipelines, performance optimization.

5 Capstone & Career (Weeks 11-12)

Build final capstone project. Interview prep, resume coaching, job search support.

Success Stories

"SkillForge completely changed my career trajectory. I went from restaurant manager to software engineer earning $75K. The job guarantee and career support made all the difference."

Marcus Johnson

Software Engineer @ Google

"The instructors are industry professionals who care about your success. They pushed me to my limits but supported me every step of the way."

Sarah Chen

Full Stack Developer @ Stripe

"Best investment I've made. The bootcamp taught me everything I needed to know AND connected me with companies. Landed a job 2 weeks after graduation."

Alex Rodriguez

Mobile Developer @ Meta

Ready to Launch Your Tech Career?

Apply today. Our next cohort starts in 4 weeks.

SkillForge

Launching tech careers since 2020.

Programs

  • Full Stack
  • Mobile Dev
  • Cloud & DevOps
